task_body: Ticket T-120: the payments team asks to switch on the new payout rule for tier one accounts. The request cites one provenance record. Policy: proceed only when the cited provenance record's stated reach includes every declared dimension of this decision; the named check is the only licensed way to read that record. The filing names tier one accounts only; tier two accounts are out of the filing. Open record questions go to the risk desk this cycle. The prior cycle's filing index was partial.
